regions.text: Are you a man or a woman or a girl or a boy? What is your country? Is the country where you live now the country of your birth?
Do you see on this page a map of the country where you live? Is it Germany, the Philippines, Brazil, Australia, Kenya, or some other country?
There are millions of readers of EP 1. The book is used in almost every country.
country: land under one government. birth: coming into being. almost: the shorter line here is almost as long as the other. "almost every country": most countries.
